title: First Steps
text: Find the y-intercept and slope of each function and the graphs.

title: Finding $$m$$
text: The slope $$m$$ is the difference between y-values divided by the difference in x-values, so $$m=\frac{y2-y1}{x2-x1}$$.

title: Identifying the Intercept
text: The y-intercept is the vertical shift of the starting point of the identity function, or the vertical distance between the origin and where the line crosses the origin.
